equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-08-29 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 15.12
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-08-29: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 15.12/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-08-29, the score printed 15.12/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
